capabilities.name: Install template/theme
capabilities.verify: install_template skill (agent-execute module:templates) + InstallTemplateDialog.tsx/useTemplateInstaller.ts admin UI; live-verified on dev 2026-07-07 via MCP gateway: staged envelope -> approve_pending_operation -> re-invoke with _approved_operation_id installed the 'blank' template (created contact page, skipped colliding home slug, installed_template manifest recorded), then cleaned up
capabilities.notes: Server-side skill surface added 2026-07-07: install_template is staged (trust_level=approve, requires_staging=true — ledger-perimeter treatment). Seeds pages/blog/KB/products/consultants/booking from the bundled catalog (_templates.json, regenerated by scripts/templates-to-json.ts); uninstalls the previous template via its installed_template manifest; preserves existing live content (colliding slugs skipped). Images are referenced as-is (interactive download remains admin-UI-only).

capabilities.name: Preview before install
capabilities.notes: Skill surface still thin — list_templates now returns catalog metadata with content counts (pages/blog_posts/kb_categories/products) and required_modules, but there is no block-level preview skill; full preview remains TemplatePreviewDialog/TemplateLivePreviewPage in the admin UI. Honest partial.

capabilities.name: Seeds pages/posts/products
capabilities.verify: useTemplateInstaller.ts (admin flow) + install_template skill seeding pages/posts/KB/products server-side; live-verified on dev 2026-07-07 (blank template: 1 page created, manifest row written)
capabilities.notes: Flipped 2026-07-07: seeding now also runs through the agent skill surface (install_template), not just the admin install flow.

capabilities.name: Theme/brand settings
capabilities.verify: BrandingSettingsPage.tsx (admin UI) + site_branding_get/site_branding_update skills — both surfaces live and gateway-callable on dev
capabilities.notes: Flipped 2026-07-07: the only remaining nit was skill homing (branding skills seed from pages-module, not templates-module). Per the naming & skill-homing policy branding is a platform/pages-owned primitive consumed by templates — the capability itself (read + write theme/brand settings via UI and agent) is fully delivered, so homing is not a functional gap.

capabilities.name: Seeds FlowPilot soul+objectives
capabilities.verify: useTemplateInstaller.ts:622 — 'Templates no longer seed FlowPilot objectives, automations, or workflows'
capabilities.notes: Moved to useFlowPilotBootstrap on module enable; no template-side skill or seeding remains.

capabilities.name: Export current site as reusable template
capabilities.verify: TemplateExportPage.tsx/TemplateExportTab.tsx (admin UI) + export_site_template skill; live-verified on dev 2026-07-07 via MCP gateway — returned valid StarterTemplate JSON (7 published pages, validation.valid=true)
capabilities.notes: Flipped 2026-07-07: read-only export_site_template skill (trust notify) mirrors the admin export (published pages + posts + settings, validateTemplate checks). KB/products are not part of the export — same as the admin page.
